name: code-review-graph
description: Graph-based code review support for analyzing code relationships and reviewing changes with structural context.

interface.shortDescription: MCP-powered graph tools for code review and codebase relationship analysis
interface.longDescription: Use Code Review Graph to inspect code structure, relationships, and review context through an MCP-backed graph analysis server.
defaultPrompt: Use Code Review Graph to inspect this codebase and explain the relevant relationships.
